summary.key_theme: 市場對 Rivian 的 R2 SUV 產品發布、技術創新（AI 與晶片）以及分析師調升目標價持樂觀態度，儘管短期交付量波動與股價回調壓力仍存在。

bullish.title: Canaccord Genuity Maintains Buy on Rivian Automotive, Raises Price Target to $22
bullish.reason: 分析師 George Gianarikas 維持買入評級並將目標價調升至 22 美元，顯示專業機構對公司長期成長潛力的信心。

bullish.title: What's Going On With Rivian Stock Monday — Rivian (RIVN) stock is surging Monday following a TD Cowen upgrade and the public debut of the R2 SUV at SXSW
bullish.reason: R2 SUV 在 SXSW 的公開亮相獲得市場正面迴響，結合 TD Cowen 的評級調升，成為推動股價上漲的主要催化劑。

bullish.title: Rivian: Why It's Finally Time To Buy (Rating Upgrade) — Rivian Automotive's efforts to create in-house chips and agentic AI software should underpin a stock repricing
bullish.reason: 公司投入自研晶片與代理 AI 軟體，被視為提升長期競爭力與實現股價重估的關鍵技術佈局。

bullish.title: What Rivian Automotive (RIVN)'s Uber Robotaxi Partnership and R2 Investment Means For Shareholders
bullish.reason: 與 Uber 的 Robotaxi 合作夥伴關係為公司開拓了新的商業模式與營收潛力，對股東價值具有正面意義。

bearish.title: Here's Why Rivian Automotive (RIVN) Fell More Than Broader Market
bearish.reason: 股價表現弱於大盤，反映出投資人對短期市場波動與獲利能力的擔憂，為近期股價回調提供解釋。

bearish.title: Rivian: Return To Growth In 2026 — Rivian (RIVN) Q4’25: gross margins hit 9% as deliveries fell 31% post EV tax credit
bearish.reason: 雖然毛利率改善至 9%，但交付量因電動車稅收抵免政策影響下滑 31%，顯示短期銷售動能面臨挑戰。

neutral.title: Super Micro Computer, GE Aerospace, Fedex, Planet Labs And Rivian: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅列出 Rivian 為當日熱門關注股票，未提供具體利多或利空消息，屬於市場情緒觀察。

neutral.title: Signet Jewelers, Rivian Automotive, Five Below And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursday
neutral.reason: 報導當日股價上漲，但主要聚焦於整體市場環境與其他公司財報，Rivian 僅為隨大盤波動的個股之一。

neutral.title: Rivian Automotive Option Alert: Apr 17 $18 Calls Sweep (8) near the Ask: 2721 @ $0.4 vs 6881 OI; Earnings 5/5 After Close [est] Ref=$15.95
neutral.reason: 選擇權市場的異常交易活動，反映出部分投資人對 5 月財報前的避險或投機佈局，不直接代表基本面變化。
